title: Potatoes (and their uses)
description: A weird mod which adds just a few more uses for potatoes.
body:
A mod which adds just a few more uses to potatoes. This mod does support Fabric (1.19.4) however due to this mod using WaveAPI which acts as its own mod loader, it does not contain fabric mod file. This mod supports all version that WaveAPI supports. [![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9sgObThQ/images/9c4e9763b7590724857fd3dfad3cf9573b5515cc.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/waveapi) # What does it add? This mod adds a few new items and blocks. Some of the things it adds include: - A few new weapons. - A stick which allows you to teleport (with multiple tiers). - A block to create poisonous potatoes from normal ones. - A block which allows you to separate poison from Poisonous Potatoes. - A block which requires a multi-block structure and summons potatoes from another world.
and more!
Some of the ideas for this mod were suggested by people on r/feedthememes subreddit.
